title: Ysuvadu
description: A creative workspace for organizing your visual fragments, motifs, and ideas — structured the way your mind actually works.
longDescription: Ysuvadu (Your Trace) is a professional creative workspace designed to bridge the gap between inspiration and organization. It allows creators to capture 'Fragments', organize them into branched 'Motifs' that mirror non-linear thinking, and track 'Momentum' through creative activity heatmaps.

title: Kitsune Tools
description: A comprehensive suite of interactive tools designed to simplify Science, Technology, Engineering, and Math operations.
longDescription: Kitsune Tools is a versatile digital workshop aimed at empowering students and professionals with high-precision STEM utilities. The platform currently hosts two primary features: an Advanced Ohm's Law Calculator for electronic component diagnostics and an Experimental Simple Pendulum Simulator for analyzing harmonic motion with custom planetary gravity settings.

title: Billing App UI
description: A comprehensive billing and inventory management interface for grocery shops and retail businesses.
longDescription: A robust billing and inventory management application tailored for grocery shops and retail businesses. Built with Angular 16, it features a modular architecture with support for inventory tracking, category-based filtering, and transaction management. The UI is powered by Bootstrap 5 and includes advanced data visualization through ECharts.

title: Japanese Learning App
description: An interactive platform for mastering JLPT N3/N4 vocabulary and Business Kanji.
longDescription: A comprehensive Japanese language learning platform designed for JLPT N3/N4 preparation and Business Kanji mastery. It features multiple study modes including an interactive Word Board for flashcard-style learning, a detailed List View for quick reference, and a progress Tracker to monitor study goals.

title: ChatGPT Prompt Checker
description: A Chrome extension designed to ensure your ChatGPT conversations stay focused on a specific topic using AI-powered prompt verification.
longDescription: This extension brings focus to your AI interactions by enforcing topic-specific constraints. It features context enforcement, AI verification via a backend worker, and smart interception of off-topic prompts with optional session bypass.

title: Personal Portfolio
description: A modern, interactive developer portfolio featuring AI-enhanced greetings, multilingual support, and a comprehensive project showcase.
longDescription: This AI-enhanced personal portfolio serves as a comprehensive professional hub. Built with a modular architecture, it chronicles a 3+ year journey across international borders (India to Japan). Featuring a multilingual interface (English/Japanese), a detailed skills matrix, and a curated project gallery.
